seo_content:
Hantec Trader Technical Infrastructure

Hantec Trader, based in Mauritius (MU) and established in December 2023, is a CFD proprietary trading firm offering Enhanced (2-step), EnhancedX (2-step), Express (1-step), and Instant Funding Lite programs. Account sizes range from $1,000 to $200,000. Two platforms are supported: MT4 and MT5. A coupon code (INSTANT20) delivers 20% off applicable programs. The firm holds a review score of 4.6 out of 5 based on 21 reviews. The Instant Lite program was introduced in September 2025.

The Enhanced 2-step program covers three sizes: $5,000 at $41.30 (original $59.00), $25,000 at $153.30 (original $219.00), and $200,000 at $818.30 (original $1,169.00). The EnhancedX 2-step is listed at $10,000 for $62.30 (original $89.00). The Express 1-step is available at $25,000 for $139.30 (original $199.00). The Instant Funding Lite program spans five sizes: $1,000 at $17.10 (original $19.00), $2,000 at $35.10 (original $39.00), $5,000 at $71.10 (original $79.00), $10,000 at $116.10 (original $129.00), and $25,000 at $215.10 (original $239.00). Payments are accepted via a wide range of methods including Credit/Debit Card, Crypto, PayPal, Skrill, Neteller, SEPA, Bank Transfer, Boleto, Pix, SPEI, PSE, Khipu, CoDi, PagoEfectivo, DANA, OVO, MBWay, Multibanco, Direct Banking, Local Wire Transfer, Mobile Money, and Thai QR.

Two platforms are supported: MT4 and MT5. Tradable instruments include FX, Metals, Indices, Energy, Crypto, and Other Commodities. Leverage is uniform across all program types: FX at 1:50, Metals at 1:10, Indices at 1:15, and Crypto at 1:1. On Instant Funding accounts, news trading is restricted — trades cannot be opened or closed within 3 minutes before or after high-impact news events. Weekend holding is not allowed on Instant Funding accounts; it is permitted on other programs. EAs are not permitted on Instant Funding accounts.

The profit split details are not explicitly broken out by program in the available data. Payouts are processed every 14 days for Enhanced, Express, Instant, and EnhancedX programs, with the first withdrawal available on demand. The minimum payout is $20 for Enhanced, Express, and Instant accounts. EnhancedX accounts require a minimum withdrawal of 2% of the starting account balance. The Profit Lock Rule applies: after a payout is made, the maximum loss level locks at the current starting balance. Instant Lite accounts carry a 3% safety buffer — the first 3% of profit cannot be withdrawn. Payout methods include Bank Transfer, Crypto, Local Wire Transfer, Neteller, PayPal, PIX, Skrill, SPEI, and Thai QR.

Hantec Trader prohibits overleveraging, defined as using 85% or more of available margin on a single asset or group of related assets. All-or-nothing trading — risking the entire daily loss limit on a single or concurrent set of trades — is banned. Only one account of each size is permitted per trader, and only one active Instant Funding account may be held at a time. Copy trading is allowed on personal accounts only. All accounts are deactivated after 30 consecutive days of inactivity.
